name: SCC_GetConsumptionCostData
title: SCC_GetConsumptionCostData
syntax: void SCC_GetConsumptionCostData ( long i1, long i2, long i3, float& StartValue, long& CostCount )
description: Gets the start value and the number of Cost subelements of the ConsumptionCost element with the selected indices.
return: The start value and the number of Cost subelements of the ConsumptionCost element with the selected indices via references, where
